ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT AES REDONDO BEACH LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

Defendant's demurrer to complaint is overruled. (see word minutes for complete details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in complaince with CRC3.1312.

Judge: Vedica Puri, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Sheila Pham CSR#13293, (415)274-9977, sheilapham28@gmail.com, Reported. (302/VP)
